qa_pairs.question: When was the Rorqual compute cluster fully unavailable for scheduled maintenance?
qa_pairs.answer: The Rorqual compute cluster was fully unavailable on September 3, 2025, from 8:00 a.m. (EDT) until 5:00 p.m. (EDT) for scheduled maintenance.

qa_pairs.question: What was the impact of the Rorqual compute cluster outage on September 3, 2025?
qa_pairs.answer: During the Rorqual outage on September 3, 2025, all compute nodes were offline, jobs scheduled to complete after 8:00 a.m. (EDT) remained in the queue, and network and storage systems associated with Rorqual were unavailable.

qa_pairs.question: Which systems were not affected by the Rorqual outage on September 3, 2025?
qa_pairs.answer: The Narval cluster and cloud instances on the Béluga and Juno platforms were not affected by the Rorqual outage on September 3, 2025.

qa_pairs.question: What was the operational capacity of the Cedar cluster starting January 22, 2025?
qa_pairs.answer: Starting January 22, 2025, the Cedar cluster operated at approximately 70% capacity.

qa_pairs.question: Why did the Cedar cluster operate at reduced capacity from January 22 to August 11, 2025?
qa_pairs.answer: The Cedar cluster operated at approximately 70% capacity from January 22 to August 11, 2025, until Fir was commissioned during the summer of 2025.

qa_pairs.question: When was the planned extended outage for the Cedar cluster in June 2025?
qa_pairs.answer: A planned extended outage for the Cedar cluster was scheduled from June 16 to June 27, 2025, and was extended to July 1, 2025.

qa_pairs.question: What was the purpose of the Cedar cluster outage from June 16 to July 1, 2025?
qa_pairs.answer: The purpose of the Cedar cluster outage from June 16 to July 1, 2025, was to support critical data-centre power and cooling upgrades for the new system installation as part of the final phase of infrastructure renewal activities.

qa_pairs.question: Were login nodes accessible during the Cedar cluster outage in June 2025?
qa_pairs.answer: No, login node access was unavailable for the entire outage period for the Cedar cluster in June 2025 due to vendor data synchronization work.

qa_pairs.question: How were file systems accessible during the Cedar cluster outage from June 16 to July 1, 2025?
qa_pairs.answer: File systems were accessible read-only via Globus only throughout the Cedar cluster outage. During the week of June 23, read-only access was limited to the old project file system (`/project/<project name>`) via Globus.

qa_pairs.question: What happened to job submissions during the Cedar cluster outage from June 16 to July 1, 2025?
qa_pairs.answer: Job submissions were suspended during the Cedar cluster outage; previously submitted jobs ran once the outage concluded.

qa_pairs.question: Was Cedar Cloud operational during the Cedar cluster outage in June 2025?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, Cedar Cloud remained operational during the Cedar cluster outage in June 2025, though brief interruptions occurred during the maintenance window.

qa_pairs.question: What caused the Cedar cluster to require a system reset after its planned outage in June 2025?
qa_pairs.answer: Following an unexpected cooling tower failure over the weekend, a system reset was required to bring the Cedar cluster back online after its planned outage in June 2025.

qa_pairs.question: When did Béluga and Narval compute nodes experience a second scheduled electrical maintenance shutdown in June 2025?
qa_pairs.answer: Béluga and Narval compute nodes experienced a second scheduled electrical maintenance shutdown from 12:00 p.m. (noon EDT) on June 13 until 12:00 p.m. (noon EDT) on June 16, 2025.

qa_pairs.question: Which cloud instances were shut down during the June 13-16, 2025, electrical maintenance affecting Béluga and Narval?
qa_pairs.answer: Cloud instances in the Juno Cloud (non-High Availability zone) were shut down during the June 13-16, 2025, electrical maintenance affecting Béluga and Narval.

qa_pairs.question: Were Béluga cloud instances affected by the June 13-16, 2025, electrical maintenance?
qa_pairs.answer: No, Béluga cloud instances were not affected by the June 13-16, 2025, electrical maintenance.

qa_pairs.question: Was storage on Béluga and Narval accessible during the June 13-16, 2025, outage?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, Béluga and Narval storage remained accessible via Globus and the login nodes of each cluster during the June 13-16, 2025, outage.

qa_pairs.question: When was the first scheduled electrical maintenance for Béluga and Narval compute nodes in June 2025?
qa_pairs.answer: The first scheduled electrical maintenance for Béluga and Narval compute nodes was from 9:00 a.m. (EDT) on June 6 until 12:00 p.m. (noon) on June 10, 2025.

qa_pairs.question: What happened to jobs scheduled to finish after 9:00 a.m. on June 6, 2025, during the Béluga and Narval outage?
qa_pairs.answer: Jobs scheduled to finish after 9:00 a.m. on June 6, 2025, remained queued until the clusters were back online.

qa_pairs.question: Did cloud instances on Béluga Cloud and in the Juno Cloud HA zone experience interruptions during the June 6-10, 2025, outage?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, cloud instances on Béluga Cloud and in the Juno Cloud HA zone experienced short access outages during the June 6-10, 2025, electrical maintenance.

qa_pairs.question: How were storage systems on Béluga and Narval affected during the June 6-10, 2025, electrical maintenance?
qa_pairs.answer: Storage systems on Béluga and Narval remained accessible via Globus and login nodes but saw intermittent disruptions due to the work during the June 6-10, 2025, electrical maintenance.

qa_pairs.question: When did Béluga and Narval compute nodes experience an electrical maintenance shutdown in April 2025?
qa_pairs.answer: Béluga and Narval compute nodes were shut down for scheduled electrical maintenance from 12:00 p.m. (EDT) on April 30 until 12:00 p.m. (EDT) on May 1, 2025.

qa_pairs.question: Which cloud instances were also shut down during the April 30-May 1, 2025, electrical maintenance?
qa_pairs.answer: Cloud instances in the Juno cloud (non-high availability zone) were also shut down during the April 30-May 1, 2025, electrical maintenance.

qa_pairs.question: Were Juno cloud instances in the high availability zone affected by the April 30-May 1, 2025, outage?
qa_pairs.answer: No, Juno cloud instances in the high availability zone were not affected by the April 30-May 1, 2025, outage.

qa_pairs.question: Was Béluga and Narval storage accessible during the April 30-May 1, 2025, outage?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, Béluga and Narval storage remained accessible through Globus and the login nodes of each cluster during the April 30-May 1, 2025, outage.
